# Agent skill security review (2026-03-14 10:43Z)

_**User**_

对以下两个Agent Skill进行安全审查（skill-vetter协议）：

## 审查对象1
**obsidian-skills** from kepano
URL: https://github.com/kepano/obsidian-skills

## 审查对象2  
**self-reflection** from hopyky
URL: https://github.com/hopyky/self-reflection

## 审查步骤（对每个对象）

### Step 1: 获取仓库信息
分别用Shell运行：
```
curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/kepano/obsidian-skills" | jq '{stars: .stargazers_count, forks: .forks_count, updated: .updated_at}'
```
```
curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/hopyky/self-reflection" | jq '{stars: .stargazers_count, forks: .forks_count, updated: .updated_at}'
```

### Step 2: 获取SKILL.md内容
用WebFetch获取：
1. https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kepano/obsidian-skills/main/SKILL.md
   或 https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kepano/obsidian-skills/main/skills/obsidian-markdown/SKILL.md
2. https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hopyky/self-reflection/main/SKILL.md

### Step 3: 红旗检查
按skill-vetter清单检查每个SK

### Step 4: 输出两份审查报告
每份格式：
```
SKILL VETTING REPORT
═══════════════════════════════════════
Skill: [name]
Source: GitHub
Author: [author]
───────────────────────────────────────
METRICS / RED FLAGS / PERMISSIONS / RISK LEVEL / VERDICT
═══════════════════════════════════════
```

```json
{
  "url": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kepano/obsidian-skills/main/skills/obsidian-markdown/SKILL.md",
  "markdown": "---\nname: obsidian-markdown\ndescription: Create and edit Obsidian Flavored Markdown with wikilinks, embeds, callouts, properties, and other Obsidian-specific syntax. Use when working with .md files in Obsidian, or when the user mentions wikilinks, callouts, frontmatter, tags, embeds, or Obsidian notes.\n---\n\n# Obsidian Flavored Markdown Skill\n\nCreate and edit valid Obsidian Flavored Markdown. Obsidian extends CommonMark and GFM with wikilinks, embeds, callouts, properties, comments, and other syntax. This skill covers only Obsidian-specific extensions -- standard Markdown (headings, bold, italic, lists, quotes, code blocks, tables) is assumed knowledge.\n\n## Workflow: Creating an Obsidian Note\n\n1. **Add frontmatter** with properties (title, tags, aliases) at the top of the file. See [PROPERTIES.md](references/PROPERTIES.md) for all property types.\n2. **Write content** using standard Markdown for structure, plus Obsidian-specific syntax below.\n3. **Link related notes** using wikilinks (&#96;[[Note]]&#96;) for internal vault connections, or standard Markdown links for external URLs.\n4. **Embed content** from other notes, images, or PDFs using the &#96;![[embed]]&#96; syntax. See [EMBEDS.md](references/EMBEDS.md) for all embed types.\n5. **Add callouts** for highlighted information using &#96;&gt; [!type]&#96; syntax. See [CALLOUTS.md](references/CALLOUTS.md) for all callout types.\n6. **Verify** the note renders correctly in Obsidian's reading view.\n\n&gt; When choosing between wikilinks and Markdown links: use &#96;[[wikilinks]]&#96; for notes within the vault (Obsidian tracks renames automatically) and &#96;[text](url)&#96; for external URLs only.\n\n## Internal Links (Wikilinks)\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;markdown\n[[Note Name]]                          Link to note\n[[Note Name|Display Text]]             Custom display text\n[[Note Name#Heading]]                  Link to heading\n[[Note Name#^block-id]]                Link to block\n[[#Heading in same note]]              Same-note heading link\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nDefine a block ID by appending &#96;^block-id&#96; to any paragraph:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;markdown\nThis paragraph can be linked to. ^my-block-id\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nFor lists and quotes, place the block ID on a separate line after the block:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;markdown\n&gt; A quote block\n\n^quote-id\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Embeds\n\nPrefix any wikilink with &#96;!&#96; to embed its content inline:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;markdown\n![[Note Name]]                         Embed full note\n![[Note Name#Heading]]                 Embed section\n![[image.png]]                         Embed image\n![[image.png|300]]                     Embed image with width\n![[document.pdf#page=3]]               Embed PDF page\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nSee [EMBEDS.md](references/EMBEDS.md) for audio, video, search embeds, and external images.\n\n## Callouts\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;markdown\n&gt; [!note]\n&gt; Basic callout.\n\n&gt; [!warning] Custom Title\n&gt; Callout with a custom title.\n\n&gt; [!faq]- Collapsed by default\n&gt; Foldable callout (- collapsed, + expanded).\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nCommon types: &#96;note&#96;, &#96;tip&#96;, &#96;warning&#96;, &#96;info&#96;, &#96;example&#96;, &#96;quote&#96;, &#96;bug&#96;, &#96;danger&#96;, &#96;success&#96;, &#96;failure&#96;, &#96;question&#96;, &#96;abstract&#96;, &#96;todo&#96;.\n\nSee [CALLOUTS.md](references/CALLOUTS.md) for the full list with aliases, nesting, and custom CSS callouts.\n\n## Properties (Frontmatter)\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml\n---\ntitle: My Note\ndate: 2024-01-15\ntags:\n  - project\n  - active\naliases:\n  - Alternative Name\ncssclasses:\n  - custom-class\n---\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nDefault properties: &#96;tags&#96; (searchable labels), &#96;aliases&#96; (alternative note names for link suggestions), &#96;cssclasses&#96; (CSS classes for styling).\n\nSee [PROPERTIES.md](references/PROPERTIES.md) for all property types, tag syntax rules, and advanced usage.\n\n## Tags\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;markdown\n#tag                    Inline tag\n#nested/tag             Nested tag with hierarchy\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nTags can contain letters, numbers (not first character), underscores, hyphens, and forward slashes. Tags can also be defined in frontmatter under the &#96;tags&#96; property.\n\n## Comments\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;markdown\nThis is visible %%but this is hidden%% text.\n\n%%\nThis entire block is hidden in reading view.\n%%\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Obsidian-Specific Formatting\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;markdown\n==Highlighted text==                   Highlight syntax\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Math (LaTeX)\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;markdown\nInline: $e^{i\\pi} + 1 = 0$\n\nBlock:\n$$\n\\frac{a}{b} = c\n$$\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Diagrams (Mermaid)\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;&#96;markdown\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\ngraph TD\n    A[Start] --&gt; B{Decision}\n    B --&gt;|Yes| C[Do this]\n    B --&gt;|No| D[Do that]\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n&#96;&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nTo link Mermaid nodes to Obsidian notes, add &#96;class NodeName internal-link;&#96;.\n\n## Footnotes\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;markdown\nText with a footnote[^1].\n\n[^1]: Footnote content.\n\nInline footnote.^[This is inline.]\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Complete Example\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;&#96;markdown\n---\ntitle: Project Alpha\ndate: 2024-01-15\ntags:\n  - project\n  - active\nstatus: in-progress\n---\n\n# Project Alpha\n\nThis project aims to [[improve workflow]] using modern techniques.\n\n&gt; [!important] Key Deadline\n&gt; The first milestone is due on ==January 30th==.\n\n## Tasks\n\n- [x] Initial planning\n- [ ] Development phase\n  - [ ] Backend implementation\n  - [ ] Frontend design\n\n## Notes\n\nThe algorithm uses $O(n \\log n)$ sorting. See [[Algorithm Notes#Sorting]] for details.\n\n![[Architecture Diagram.png|600]]\n\nReviewed in [[Meeting Notes 2024-01-10#Decisions]].\n&#96;&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## References\n\n- [Obsidian Flavored Markdown](https://help.obsidian.md/obsidian-flavored-markdown)\n- [Internal links](https://help.obsidian.md/links)\n- [Embed files](https://help.obsidian.md/embeds)\n- [Callouts](https://help.obsidian.md/callouts)\n- [Properties](https://help.obsidian.md/properties)\n"
}

[self-reflection - OpenClaw Skills](https://openclawskills.best/skills/hopyky/self-reflection/)<br/>3. [[FEATURE]: add self-reflection mechanism to improve code reliability · Issue #7047 · anomalyco/opencode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/issues/7047)<br/>4. [Self-reflection](https://medium.com/@selcia.amanda34/self-reflection-353fe06e500c)<br/>5. [The Reflection Pattern: Building Self-Correcting AI Systems](https://hopx.ai/blog/ai-agents/reflection-pattern-self-correcting-ai/)<br/><br/># hopyky/self-reflection GitHub Repository<br/><br/>The **hopyky/self-reflection** is an open-source GitHub project that provides a continuous self-improvement skill for AI agents.[1] <br/><br/>## Key Features<br/><br/>The project helps AI agents track mistakes, log lessons learned, and build institutional memory over time.[1] It addresses the problem that "AI agents make mistakes. Without memory, they repeat them," creating a structured feedback loop where agents regularly pause, reflect on their performance, and document learnings.[1]<br/><br/>## How It Works<br/><br/>The skill operates on a heartbeat mechanism (triggered every 60 minutes) that prompts the agent to run a self-reflection check.[1] When triggered:<br/>- The agent checks if reflection is due<br/>- If not due: continues normally (OK)<br/>- If due: enters ALERT mode and runs reflection commands to read past lessons and log new insights[2]<br/><br/>## Available Commands<br/><br/>The skill provides several commands:[2]<br/>- `check [--quiet]` — Check if reflection is due<br/>- `log` — Log a new reflection with category, mistake description, and lesson<br/>- `read [n]` — Read last n reflections (default: 5)<br/>- `stats` — Show reflection statistics<br/>- `reset` — Reset the timer<br/><br/>## Technical Details<br/><br/>- **License**: MIT[1]<br/>- **Language**: Shell[1]<br/>- **Repository**: https://github.com/hopyky/self-reflection<br/>- Integrates with OpenClaw Skills framework[2]<br/>- Requires `jq` and `date` binaries[2]<br/><br/>The project also appears in broader discussions about AI self-correction mechanisms in coding agents.[3] |

</details>
</tool-use>

{
  "url": "https://openclawskills.best/skills/hopyky/self-reflection/",
  "markdown": "self-reflection - OpenClaw Skills\n\n[skills](https://openclawskills.best/)$openclaw/self-reflection\n\n6.8k★\n\nby [hopyky](https://github.com/openclaw)\n\n# self-reflection – OpenClaw Skill\n\nself-reflection is an OpenClaw Skills integration for coding workflows. Continuous self-improvement through structured reflection and memory\n\n6.8k stars8.2k forksSecurity L1\n\nUpdated Feb 7, 2026Created Feb 7, 2026coding\n\n## Skill Snapshot\n\n| name | self-reflection |\n| --- | --- |\n| description | Continuous self-improvement through structured reflection and memory OpenClaw Skills integration. |\n| owner | hopyky |\n| repository | [hopyky/self-reflection](https://github.com/openclaw/skills/tree/main/skills/hopyky/self-reflection) |\n| language | Markdown |\n| license | MIT |\n| topics |\n| security | L1 |\n| install | openclaw add @hopyky/self-reflection |\n| last updated | Feb 7, 2026 |\n\n## Maintainer\n\nhopyky\n\nMaintains self-reflection in the OpenClaw Skills directory.\n\n[View GitHub profile](https://github.com/openclaw)\n\nFile Explorer\n\n4 files\n\n.\n\n_meta.json\n\n282 B\n\nREADME.md\n\n10.4 KB\n\nself-reflection.example.json\n\n166 B\n\nSKILL.md\n\n2.6 KB\n\nSKILL.md\n\n---\n\n### name: self-reflection description: Continuous self-improvement through structured reflection and memory version: 1.1.1 metadata: {\"openclaw\":{\"emoji\":\"🪞\",\"requires\":{\"bins\":[\"jq\",\"date\"]}}}\n\n## 🪞 Self-Reflection\n\nA skill for continuous self-improvement. The agent tracks mistakes, lessons learned, and improvements over time through regular heartbeat-triggered reflections.\n\n### Quick Start\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n# Check if reflection is needed\nself-reflection check\n\n# Log a new reflection\nself-reflection log \"error-handling\" \"Forgot timeout on API call\" \"Always add timeout=30\"\n\n# Read recent lessons\nself-reflection read\n\n# View statistics\nself-reflection stats\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### How It Works\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nHeartbeat (60m) → Agent reads HEARTBEAT.md → Runs self-reflection check\n                                                      │\n                                            ┌─────────┴─────────┐\n                                            ▼                   ▼\n                                           OK              ALERT\n                                            │                   │\n                                       Continue            Reflect\n                                                               │\n                                                     ┌─────────┴─────────┐\n                                                     ▼                   ▼\n                                                   read               log\n                                              (past lessons)     (new insights)\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Commands\n\n| Command | Description |\n| --- | --- |\n| &#96;check [--quiet]&#96; | Check if reflection is due (OK or ALERT) |\n| &#96;log &#96; | Log a new reflection |\n| &#96;read [n]&#96; | Read last n reflections (default: 5) |\n| &#96;stats&#96; | Show reflection statistics |\n| &#96;reset&#96; | Reset the timer |\n\n### OpenClaw Integration\n\nEnable heartbeat in&#96;~/.openclaw/openclaw.json&#96;:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n{\n  \"agents\": {\n    \"defaults\": {\n      \"heartbeat\": {\n        \"every\": \"60m\",\n        \"activeHours\": { \"start\": \"08:00\", \"end\": \"22:00\" }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nAdd to your workspace&#96;HEARTBEAT.md&#96;:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n## Self-Reflection Check (required)\nRun &#96;self-reflection check&#96; at each heartbeat.\nIf ALERT: read past lessons, reflect, then log insights.\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Configuration\n\nCreate&#96;~/.openclaw/self-reflection.json&#96;:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n{\n  \"threshold_minutes\": 60,\n  \"memory_file\": \"~/workspace/memory/self-review.md\",\n  \"state_file\": \"~/.openclaw/self-review-state.json\",\n  \"max_entries_context\": 5\n}\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Author\n\nCreated by [hopyky](https://github.com/hopyky)\n\n### License\n\nMIT\n\nREADME.md\n\n## 🪞 Self-Reflection\n\nA continuous self-improvement skill for AI agents. Track mistakes, log lessons learned, and build institutional memory over time.\n\n### Why?\n\nAI agents make mistakes. Without memory, they repeat them. This skill creates a structured feedback loop where agents regularly pause, reflect on their performance, and document learnings.\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\"The only real mistake is the one from which we learn nothing.\"\n                                                    — Henry Ford\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Architecture\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐\n│                         OPENCLAW GATEWAY                            │\n├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤\n│                                                                     │\n│  ┌─────────────┐    Heartbeat     ┌──────────────────────────────┐ │\n│  │             │    (every 60m)   │                              │ │\n│  │   AGENT     │ ───────────────► │  HEARTBEAT.md                │ │\n│  │             │                  │  └─► \"self-reflection check\" │ │\n│  │             │                  │                              │ │\n│  └──────┬──────┘                  └──────────────────────────────┘ │\n│         │                                                           │\n│         │ executes                                                  │\n│         ▼                                                           │\n│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │\n│  │                    SELF-REFLECTION SKILL                     │   │\n│  ├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤   │\n│  │                                                             │   │\n│  │   $ self-reflection check                                   │   │\n│  │         │                                                   │   │\n│  │         ▼                                                   │   │\n│  │   ┌─────────────┐                                           │   │\n│  │   │ &lt; 60 min ?  │                                           │   │\n│  │   └──────┬──────┘                                           │   │\n│  │          │                                                  │   │\n│  │    YES   │   NO                                             │   │\n│  │    ┌─────┴─────┐                                            │   │\n│  │    ▼           ▼                                            │   │\n│  │  ┌───┐    ┌─────────┐                                       │   │\n│  │  │OK │    │ ALERT   │──► Agent reflects                     │   │\n│  │  └───┘    └─────────┘    └──► self-reflection read          │   │\n│  │    │                          └──► self-reflection log      │   │\n│  │    ▼                                     │                  │   │\n│  │  Continue                                ▼                  │   │\n│  │  normally                         ┌────────────┐            │   │\n│  │                                   │ MEMORY.md  │            │   │\n│  │                                   │ (lessons)  │            │   │\n│  │                                   └────────────┘            │   │\n│  │                                                             │   │\n│  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │\n│                                                                     │\n└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘\n\n                        ┌──────────────────┐\n                        │   STATE FILE     │\n                        │ (last_reflection │\n                        │  timestamp)      │\n                        └──────────────────┘\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### How It Works\n\n1. Memory persists → Lessons stored in markdown for future reference\n2. If ALERT → Agent reviews past lessons and logs new insights\n3. Skill checks timer → Compares current time with last reflection\n4. Agent reads HEARTBEAT.md → Sees instruction to run&#96;self-reflection check&#96;\n5. Heartbeat triggers → OpenClaw runs heartbeat every 60 minutes (08:00-22:00)\n\n### Quick Start\n\n#### Installation\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n# Clone the skill\ngit clone https://github.com/hopyky/self-reflection.git ~/.openclaw/skills/self-reflection\n\n# Add to PATH\nln -sf ~/.openclaw/skills/self-reflection/bin/self-reflection ~/bin/self-reflection\n\n# Create config\ncp ~/.openclaw/skills/self-reflection/self-reflection.example.json ~/.openclaw/self-reflection.json\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### OpenClaw Integration\n\nAdd heartbeat to your&#96;~/.openclaw/openclaw.json&#96;:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n{\n  \"agents\": {\n    \"defaults\": {\n      \"heartbeat\": {\n        \"every\": \"60m\",\n        \"activeHours\": {\n          \"start\": \"08:00\",\n          \"end\": \"22:00\"\n        }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nAdd to your&#96;HEARTBEAT.md&#96;:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n## Self-Reflection Check (required)\n\nRun &#96;self-reflection check&#96; at each heartbeat.\n\n- If **OK**: Continue normally.\n- If **ALERT**: Run &#96;self-reflection read&#96;, reflect, then &#96;self-reflection log&#96;.\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Commands\n\n| Command | Description |\n| --- | --- |\n| &#96;self-reflection check&#96; | Check if reflection is due (OK or ALERT) |\n| &#96;self-reflection check --quiet&#96; | Silent mode for scripts |\n| &#96;self-reflection log &#96; | Log a new reflection |\n| &#96;self-reflection read [n]&#96; | Read last n reflections (default: 5) |\n| &#96;self-reflection stats&#96; | Show statistics and top tags |\n| &#96;self-reflection reset&#96; | Reset the timer |\n\n### Usage Examples\n\n#### Check Status\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n$ self-reflection check\nOK: Status good. Next reflection due in 45 minutes.\n\n# When reflection is needed:\n$ self-reflection check\nALERT: Self-reflection required. Last reflection was 65 minutes ago.\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### Log a Reflection\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n$ self-reflection log \"error-handling\" \\\n    \"Forgot to handle API timeout\" \\\n    \"Always add timeout parameter to requests\"\n\nReflection logged successfully.\n  Tag:  error-handling\n  Miss: Forgot to handle API timeout\n  Fix:  Always add timeout parameter to requests\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### Read Past Lessons\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n$ self-reflection read 3\n=== Last 3 reflections (of 12 total) ===\n\n## 2026-01-30 14:30 | error-handling\n\n**Miss:** Forgot to handle API timeout\n**Fix:** Always add timeout parameter to requests\n\n---\n\n## 2026-01-30 10:15 | communication\n\n**Miss:** Response was too verbose\n**Fix:** Lead with the answer, then explain\n\n---\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### View Statistics\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n$ self-reflection stats\n=== Self-Reflection Statistics ===\n\nLast reflection: 2026-01-30 14:30:00\nTotal reflections: 12\n\nEntries in memory: 12\n\nTop tags:\n  error-handling: 4\n  communication: 3\n  api: 2\n\nThreshold: 60 minutes\nMemory file: ~/workspace/memory/self-review.md\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Configuration\n\nCreate&#96;~/.openclaw/self-reflection.json&#96;:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n{\n  \"threshold_minutes\": 60,\n  \"memory_file\": \"~/workspace/memory/self-review.md\",\n  \"state_file\": \"~/.openclaw/self-review-state.json\",\n  \"max_entries_context\": 5\n}\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n| Option | Default | Description |\n| --- | --- | --- |\n| &#96;threshold_minutes&#96; | 60 | Minutes between required reflections |\n| &#96;memory_file&#96; | &#96;~/workspace/memory/self-review.md&#96; | Where reflections are stored |\n| &#96;state_file&#96; | &#96;~/.openclaw/self-review-state.json&#96; | Timer state file |\n| &#96;max_entries_context&#96; | 5 | Default entries shown by&#96;read&#96; |\n\n### Memory Format\n\nReflections are stored in human-readable Markdown:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n# Self-Review Log\n\nThis file contains lessons learned and improvements for continuous growth.\n\n---\n\n## 2026-01-30 14:30 | error-handling\n\n**Miss:** Forgot to handle API timeout\n**Fix:** Always add timeout parameter to requests\n\n---\n\n## 2026-01-30 10:15 | communication\n\n**Miss:** Response was too verbose\n**Fix:** Lead with the answer, then explain\n\n---\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Recommended Tags\n\n| Tag | Use for |\n| --- | --- |\n| &#96;error-handling&#96; | Missing try/catch, unhandled edge cases |\n| &#96;communication&#96; | Verbose responses, unclear explanations |\n| &#96;api&#96; | API usage mistakes, wrong endpoints |\n| &#96;performance&#96; | Slow code, inefficient algorithms |\n| &#96;ux&#96; | Poor user experience decisions |\n| &#96;security&#96; | Security oversights |\n| &#96;testing&#96; | Missing tests, untested edge cases |\n\n### File Structure\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n~/.openclaw/\n├── skills/\n│   └── self-reflection/\n│       ├── bin/\n│       │   └── self-reflection     # CLI script\n│       ├── README.md\n│       ├── SKILL.md                # OpenClaw manifest\n│       ├── LICENSE\n│       └── self-reflection.example.json\n├── self-reflection.json            # Your config\n└── self-review-state.json          # Timer state (auto-created)\n\n~/workspace/\n└── memory/\n    └── self-review.md              # Lessons (auto-created)\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Dependencies\n\n- &#96;date&#96;(GNU coreutils)\n- &#96;jq&#96;(JSON processing)\n- &#96;bash&#96;(4.0+)\n\n### License\n\nMIT License - See [LICENSE](https://openclawskills.best/skills/hopyky/self-reflection/LICENSE) for details.\n\n### Author\n\nCreated by [hopyky](https://github.com/hopyky)\n\n### Contributing\n\nIssues and PRs welcome at [github.com/hopyky/self-reflection](https://github.com/hopyky/self-reflection)\n\n## Permissions &amp; Security\n\nSecurity level L1: Low-risk skills with minimal permissions. Review inputs and outputs before running in production.\n\n## Requirements\n\n- Topics:\n- License: MIT\n- Language: Markdown\n- OpenClaw CLI installed and configured.\n\n## Configuration\n\nCreate &#96;~/.openclaw/self-reflection.json&#96;: &#96;&#96;&#96;json { \"threshold_minutes\": 60, \"memory_file\": \"~/workspace/memory/self-review.md\", \"state_file\": \"~/.openclaw/self-review-state.json\", \"max_entries_context\": 5 } &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## FAQ\n\n### How do I install self-reflection?\n\nRun openclaw add @hopyky/self-reflection in your terminal. This installs self-reflection into your OpenClaw Skills catalog.\n\n### Does this skill run locally or in the cloud?\n\nOpenClaw Skills execute locally by default. Review the SKILL.md and permissions before running any skill.\n\n### Where can I verify the source code?\n\nThe source repository is available at https://github.com/openclaw/skills/tree/main/skills/hopyky/self-reflection. Review commits and README documentation before installing."
}
